mapper.sql: id, bangumi_id, type, title_cn, title_original, summary, nsfw, locked, series, air_date, platform, cover_url, images, eps, total_episodes, volumes, meta_tags, tags, rating, collection, infobox, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_anime (bangumi_id, type, title_cn, title_original, summary, nsfw, locked, series, air_date, platform, cover_url, images, eps, total_episodes, volumes, meta_tags, tags, rating, collection, infobox) VALUES (#{bangumiId}, #{type}, #{titleCn}, #{titleOriginal}, #{summary}, #{nsfw}, #{locked}, #{series}, #{airDate}, #{platform}, #{coverUrl}, #{images,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.AnimeImagesTypeHandler}, #{eps}, #{totalEpisodes}, #{volumes}, #{metaTags,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.StringListTypeHandler}, #{tags,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.AnimeTagListTypeHandler}, #{rating,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.RatingTypeHandler}, #{collection,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.CollectionTypeHandler}, #{infobox,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.InfoboxListTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_anime SET type = #{type}, title_cn = #{titleCn}, title_original = #{titleOriginal}, summary = #{summary}, nsfw = #{nsfw}, locked = #{locked}, series = #{series}, air_date = #{airDate}, platform = #{platform}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, images = #{images,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.AnimeImagesTypeHandler}, eps = #{eps}, total_episodes = #{totalEpisodes}, volumes = #{volumes}, meta_tags = #{metaTags,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.StringListTypeHandler}, tags = #{tags,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.AnimeTagListTypeHandler}, rating = #{rating,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.RatingTypeHandler}, collection = #{collection,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.CollectionTypeHandler}, infobox = #{infobox,typeHandler=com.anitrack.infra.dal.handler.InfoboxListTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
